chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-419 of 2020. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 15.02.2022 None for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has mainly prayed for suspension of non-bailable warrant, which was issued against by him on account of his failure to make payment of penal amount worth Rs.30,000/-, which was imposed upon him consequent upon forfeiture of his bail bond, by learned 2nd Judicial Magistrate, Larkana. None has put appearance on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation is furnished. It is reported by learned 2nd Judicial Magistrate, Larkana that non-bailable warrant issued against the petitioner has been recalled and vacated consequent upon making payment of penal amount by the petitioner. In view of above, the instant constitutional petition having become infructuous is disposed of accordingly. J JUDGE
